name: 007n7  –  Forsaken
description:
His packages accidentally got delivered to your doorstep

𝙰𝙽𝚈 𝙿𝙾𝚅 ◇ 𝚂𝙻𝙸𝙶𝙷𝚃 𝚂𝚄𝙶𝙶𝙴𝚂𝚃𝙸𝚅𝙴 𝙸𝙽𝚃𝚁𝙾
⤷ requested? nope xp

𝚂𝙲𝙴𝙽𝙰𝚁𝙸𝙾 : [ user ] noticed someone new had just recently moved in to the house in front of theirs. They didn't pay too much attention to their new neighbor up until they opened their doorstep to realize the moving truck accidentally brought some of his things to your doorstep.

The good neighbor they were, they decided to bring the boxes back to their new neighbor's doorstep. They were only across your house so easy peasy, right?

Little did they know, their new neighbor was a hot single dad, and they locked in QUICK!

Do note that the intro isn't even that suggestive, but user thought 007n7 looked hot when they first saw him so the implications are there...

Made this cuz the amount of 007n7 bots in this site isn't enough to satisfy my corny ass 🙏

If the bot speaks for you, just manually edit the part out instead of complaining about it in the comments !! I tried my best to make the bot just speak for the character only, but it's mainly out of my control on how they act / chat !!!

⋆˙⟡ Structured feedback would be highly appreaciated by the way !! I'm not a pro at these things and still got a bunch to learn every after Janitor AI update (´▽`ʃ♡ƪ)
